disease: Lung Cancer (malignant neoplasm of bronchus and lung) — INTERIM reference derived from public databases
status: INTERIM — derived from public reference databases. A clinically-validated authoritative list will supersede this when available.
sources_used_for_this_interim_set: PhecodeX v1.0 vocabulary — phecode CA_102.1 'Malignant neoplasm of bronchus and lung', plus CA_114.42 (carcinoid) and CA_137.1 (benign) for optional inclusion
CDC ICD-10-CM FY2026 code descriptions — full C34.* leaf sweep
CMS ICD-9-CM v32 (FY2014 final) master descriptions — full 162.* leaf sweep
AHRQ CCSR v2026-1 category NEO022 'Respiratory cancers' — broader category included for reference
how_to_use: Use PhecodeX CA_102.1 codes as the primary cohort inclusion list — this matches the standard PheWAS convention for lung-cancer ascertainment. The C34.* and 162.* full-leaf sweeps are defensive (catch any leaf codes added post-PhecodeX). CA_114.42 and CA_137.1 subsections are available if the study wants to include carcinoid or benign neoplasms.

hcpcs.status: not populated in interim — HCPCS choices (chemotherapy J-codes, radiation G-codes, lung biopsy) are protocol-specific.
hcpcs.hint: When populated, look in ../databases/hcpcs/april-2026/HCPC2026_APR_ANWEB.txt for J-series (drug administration) and G-series (Medicare screening/procedures), and consult the lung cancer pipeline reference SQL for protocol-specific codes.

cohort_constraints_placeholder.note: The diabetes example pipeline uses 7 SE states (AL/FL/GA/MS/NC/SC/TN), study period 2005–2018, with EL_DOB > 1980-01-01. Lung cancer study cohort constraints depend on the specific protocol and will differ.

notes: This interim list is derived from public reference databases (PhecodeX + CDC + CMS + AHRQ CCSR) and is intended as a starting point for protocol-specific refinement.
When a clinically-validated authoritative list is available, this file should be superseded (but retained in git history for audit).
Schema parallels examples/diabetes_codes.json where possible, with the interim status made explicit.
generator: icd_code_reference agent (Phase 2 — interim extraction from PhecodeX/CDC/CMS/CCSR)
